generatedSources.name: #utility.yul

deployedGeneratedSources.name: #utility.yul

documentation.text:
@dev This is a minimal version of a trusted forwarder with high degree of extensibility
 through permissionless and user-defined "macro contracts".

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (contract ISuperfluid,bytes memory,address) view external returns (struct ISuperfluid.Operation memory[] memory)
function (contract IUserDefinedMacro,bytes calldata) view returns (struct ISuperfluid.Operation memory[] memory)

devdoc.details: This is a minimal version of a trusted forwarder with high degree of extensibility through permissionless and user-defined "macro contracts".

buildBatchOperations(address,bytes).details: A convenience view wrapper for building the batch operations using a macro.

returns.operations: Operations returned by the macro after the simulation.

runMacro(address,bytes).details: Run the macro defined by the provided macro contract and params.

params.params: Parameters to run the macro. If value (native coins) is provided, it is forwarded.
